reviews.review_description:
The swordplay in this game is so sharp it feels dangerous to touch the controller. 
The core mechanic relies on a perfect-parry system where deflecting enemy laser fire back into their stupid robotic faces fills up your "Overdrive" meter. 
Once that meter is full? 
Time slows down, the synthwave music kicks into overdrive, and you become a Cyberpunk Android Rogue Warrior on steroids!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review!  We're glad that you enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_description: How is this game not gaining more traction? The whole vibe is incredible - I feel like a cyberpunk Jedi as I'm slicing through enemies! The window in the hub is a great addition, and I found myself just watching the cars fly by. If this game gets Quest Achievements, I will hunt every single one. Awesome game.

developer_response.body: We're so glad you enjoyed the game!  We'll definitely look into adding Quest Achievements cause that would be a fun addition to the game.  We'll be adding more updates to the game soon.

reviews.review_description:
Shin Zero delivers exactly the kind of fast-paced sword combat that feels amazing in VR. Deflecting lasers, slicing robots and throwing your plasma blade creates a constant flow of action that never gets old.

The combat feels responsive, the abilities add great variety and the progression keeps introducing new challenges. If you enjoy action games and futuristic sword fighting, this is an easy recommendation.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review.  We're glad that you're enjoying the game!
